case_title: ANDREW KIT WOO RESPONDENT VS. PATRICK CHIECHI et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT CHIECHI, PATRICK CHIECHI, JULIET AS TO RESPONDENT WOO, ANDREW KIT HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT CHIECHI, PATRICK CHIECHI, JULIET RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF WOO, ANDREW KIT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,089.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT CHIECHI, PATRICK CHIECHI, JULIET TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT WOO, ANDREW KIT ON CROSS-COMPLAINT, JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT/DEFENDANT PATRICK CHEICHI AND JULIET CHEICHI AND AGAINST RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF ANDREW KIT WOO IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000.00 PLUS COURT CLOSTS OF $89.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-28-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
